metadata.name: Code Generator
metadata.description: Multi-language code generation with explanations using CodeGenerationAgent
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

inputs.name: Task Description
inputs.default: Write a Python function to check if a string is a palindrome

outputs.name: Test Cases
outputs.description: Example test cases for the code

documentation.overview: This workflow generates production-quality code in multiple programming languages with detailed explanations and test cases. Perfect for rapid prototyping, code assistance, learning, and automating repetitive coding tasks.
use_cases: Code snippets for documentation and tutorials
Learning new programming languages and frameworks
Boilerplate code generation for common patterns
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
GPT-4 recommended for complex code generation

example_inputs.task_description: Write a Python function to check if a string is a palindrome
Create a REST API endpoint for user authentication

example_outputs.generated_code:
def is_palindrome(s: str) -> bool:
    """Check if string is palindrome (case-insensitive, ignores spaces)."""
    cleaned = ''.join(s.lower().split())
    return cleaned == cleaned[::-1]
example_outputs.explanation: This function checks if a string is a palindrome by: 1) Converting to lowercase, 2) Removing spaces, 3) Comparing the string with its reverse. Returns True if palindrome, False otherwise.

test_cases.input: A man a plan a canal Panama
